issue_summary: Make TrieRange completely independent from Document/Field with TokenStream of prefix encoded values
javadoc_before:
/** * A trie filter for matching trie coded values using the given field name and * the default helper field. * precisionStep must me equal or a multiple of the precisionStep * used for indexing the values. * You can leave the bounds open, by supplying null for min and/or * max. Inclusive/exclusive bounds can also be supplied. * To query float values use the converter {@link TrieUtils#floatToSortableInt}. *

This is the counterpart to {@link TrieUtils#addIndexedFields(Document,String,String[])}. *

This is the recommended usage of TrieUtils/IntTrieRangeFilter. */
javadoc_after: /** * A trie filter for matching trie coded values using the given field name and * the default helper field. * precisionStep must me equal or a multiple of the precisionStep * used for indexing the values. * You can leave the bounds open, by supplying null for min and/or * max. Inclusive/exclusive bounds can also be supplied. * To query float values use the converter {@link TrieUtils#floatToSortableInt}. */
